title: cynoglossum zeylanicum
intro: Cynoglossum zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylon tongue flower, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, known for its medicinal and culinary uses. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum zeylanicum include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Cynoglossum zeylanicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
